name: Apple Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, salt, and sugar together.
2. Cut in shortening and add raisins.
3. Add milk to which the egg has been added; mix until a stiff dough forms.
4. Pour into an oiled shallow pan.
5. Brush the dough with melted butter.
6. Quarter, core, and slice apples.
7. Arrange slices in rows on top of the dough, overlapping edges.
8. Brush apples with more melted butter and sprinkle with cinnamon and brown sugar mixed together.
9. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until apples are tender (serves 9).
